name: Chocolate Pizza (2)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup candied cherries, red and green
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan or over the top of a double boiler, melt 6 ounces white chocolate and 6 ounces semisweet chocolate chips.
2. Stir in peanuts, marshmallows, and rice crispy cereal.
3. Pour the mixture onto a greased 10-inch pizza pan or a 10-inch circle of cardboard covered with foil.
4. Spread to an even layer.
5. Sprinkle with coconut.
6. Top with candied cherries (red and green).
7. Melt the remaining white chocolate.
8. Drizzle over the pizza.
9. Chill. Yield: 16-20 servings.
